extra.reasoning: Property: never (rec_drug_a AND rec_drug_b). rec_drug_a is set true ONLY by r1 (priority 50), which requires the full 8-way conjunction C = g6pd_deficiency AND seizure_history AND hypertension AND hepatic_impairment AND elderly AND hyperkalemia AND pregnancy AND ckd_dialysis. No other rule affects rec_drug_a, so rec_drug_a=true requires C to hold. rec_drug_b is affected by r3 (priority 50, IF g6pd_deficiency THEN true) and r5 (priority 90, IF C THEN false). Per-output conflict resolution: highest priority matching rule wins. When C holds (the only way rec_drug_a can be true), r5 (priority 90) also matches and beats r3 (priority 50), forcing rec_drug_b := false. When C does not hold, r1 cannot fire so rec_drug_a defaults to false. Thus rec_drug_a=true implies rec_drug_b=false in every case; the conjunction can never be jointly true. Property holds for the entire input space.
